markdown:
#  Delete a Compliance Document from a Subcontractor Invoice 
#####  General Availability in Select Markets (United States)
![Flag Us](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/eb8f21ce49403a47d7bb5a0cedc7e0e9/7c0ec0977e654cc6bc9f3d8efa80fbe3/flag-us.png?fm=webp&h=14) [Procore Pay ](https://www.procore.com/pay) is available in the United States. It is designed for General Contractors and Owner-Builders who act as their own General Contractors on a job. Procore Pay extends the [Invoice Management](https://www.procore.com/invoice-management) functionality in the Procore web application to handle the payment process between general and specialty contractors.
##  Background 
Invoice contacts cannot perform this action. Invoice administrators on a Procore project can delete compliance documents for a payee from the Commitments or Invoicing tool. Payments Admins and Disbursers with invoice administrator permissions can also perform this action.
##  Things to Consider 
  * [Required User Permissions](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/permissions)


##  Steps 
  1. Open a subcontractor invoice from the **Commitments** , **Invoicing** , or **Payments** tool.
  2. Click the **Compliance** tab.
  3. Click the vertical ellipsis and choose the **Delete** option.  
  
![Delete Compliance Documents From A Subcontractor Invoice](https://images.ctfassets.net/plvbd9i6qkpm/970afc2d39f12c03ee892702766f56cc/c4b1f29adc1386f59774c4575a5247fc/delete-compliance-documents-from-a-subcontractor-invoice.png?fm=webp)  
A green success banner appears to confirm the delete action.


## See Also
  * [Configure Payment Requirements as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/configure-payment-requirements-as-a-payor)
  * [View Payment Requirements as a Payor](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-payment-requirements-as-a-payor)
  * [View Payment Requirements as an Invoice Administrator](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/procore-pay/tutorials/view-payment-requirements-as-an-invoice-administrator)
title: Delete a Compliance Document from a Subcontractor Invoice
description: How to delete a compliance document from a subcontractor invoice when using the Invoice management tools with Procore Pay.
